description_long: This is a heavily armored adult figure dressed in tactical gear, including a bulletproof vest, helmet with visor, and protective padding on the arms, legs, and torso. The individual wears a balaclava covering most of the face, with only the eyes and part of the nose visible. The outfit features multiple utility pouches and straps, likely for carrying equipment or ammunition, and gloves that provide additional hand protection. The figure also has a radio antenna protruding from the back, suggesting communication capabilities. The boots are robust and designed for urban or combat environments, while the overall attire is form-fitting yet reinforced for maximum mobility and defense. The ensemble is typical of a SWAT or special forces operative prepared for high-risk urban operations.
description: A heavily armored adult in tactical gear with helmet, vest, and utility pouches, dressed for urban combat or law enforcement operations.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full tactical outfit, helmet, face covering, and utility vest with pouches.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the helmet profile, arm padding, and visible radio antenna on the back.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the vest, radio antenna, and protective gear on the legs and arms.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing arm protection, helmet, and side profile of the boots.
attribute_clothing_type: tactical body armor with helmet, bulletproof vest, protective padding, gloves, and utility pouches
